title: How to pronounce `buildah`?
body: Not being a native english speaker, I'm struggling to explain people the origin of the name of this project. It would be nice to have an .wav|.mp3|.ogg audio file with the correct pronounce for `buildah`. Event better if coming from @rhatdan itself, the inspiration of it.

comments.body: Excellent suggestion, hopefully we'll be able to twist Dan's arm to do this.  FWIW, I'd say it's pronounced like "bill-dah".  It's a very New England pronunciation, especially inside of the route 128/95 highway that's circles Boston, MA about 15 miles from the city.
You can always threaten him with `setenforce 0 selinux` ;)
I will put something together on Monday.
